name: Claim denied cuz 'not serious enough,' what now Boise ID?
description: Appeal w/ better evidence in 1 yr—ID commission hearing.

mainEntity.name: Claim denied cuz 'not serious enough,' what now Boise ID?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal w/ better evidence in 1 yr—ID commission hearing.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal to Idaho Industrial Commission within 1 yr; provide more medical proof.** Many reversed.[2] Key factors: Quantify pain, future care; forklift cases often severe. Idaho no-fault comp. Lawyer wins appeals.
